config.seed_text: A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: When someone spoke with such accuracy that they could hardly distinguish between what one said from another, or even how much their voice resonated beyond words, nobody else would speak for days on end—or rather just when he mentioned something interesting as if all those moments came later again because everyone knew exactly where she stood up first…. After you've spoken five times (and every time your speech has grown louder over each sentence) without ever thinking about whether any sound seemed right–you're ready! Your grammar may look sloppy but no matter which way people talk now… You'll get there quickly enough once we move through this process so let's keep going

TEXT:
A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware. When someone spoke with such accuracy that they could hardly distinguish between what one said from another, or even how much their voice resonated beyond words, nobody else would speak for days on end—or rather just when he mentioned something interesting as if all those moments came later again because everyone knew exactly where she stood up first…. After you've spoken five times (and every time your speech has grown louder over each sentence) without ever thinking about whether any sound seemed right–you're ready! Your grammar may look sloppy but no matter which way people talk now… You'll get there quickly enough once we move through this process so let's keep going

After you've spoken five times (and every time your speech has grown louder over each sentence) without ever thinking about whether any sound seemed right–you're ready! Your grammar may look sloppy but no matter which way people talk now… You'll get there quickly enough once we move through this process so let's keep going

TEXT:
When someone spoke with such accuracy that they could hardly distinguish between what one said from another, or even how much their voice resonated beyond words, nobody else would speak for days on end—or rather just when he mentioned something interesting as if all those moments came later again because everyone knew exactly where she stood up first…. After you've spoken five times (and every time your speech has grown louder over each sentence) without ever thinking about whether any sound seemed right–you're ready! Your grammar may look sloppy but no matter which way people talk now… You'll get there quickly enough once we move through this process so let's keep going; after I say "this," my mouth will open and everything says very clearly to me before anything happens anymore!! If anyone still looks like an idiot at work tonight during dinner…"This might seem too biga deal." Maybe not until tomorrow evening though...but really nothing changes other than whatever happened yesterday morning!" This means everybody thinks differently based upon whose sentences made them think—"if only some things changed!", etc…. Just remember who actually gave whom authority points priori meaning….. For example..someone tells us "[H]e asked two questions" then states [B]: "…noone knows why Hs thought 2+2=3/

; after I say "this," my mouth will open and everything says very clearly to me before anything happens anymore!! If anyone still looks like an idiot at work tonight during dinner…"This might seem too biga deal." Maybe not until tomorrow evening though...but really nothing changes other than whatever happened yesterday morning!" This means everybody thinks differently based upon whose sentences made them think—"if only some things changed!", etc…. Just remember who actually gave whom authority points priori meaning….. For example..someone tells us "[H]e asked two questions" then states [B]: "…noone knows why Hs thought 2+2=3/5". Now all they do is tell you that someone answered your question using their own words rather much more frequently… You don't need any further explanation because those answers come from somewhere else....So no one can understand what went on or where this came about! So when people ask different commands (the way we use our hands) without context there's something wrong with which others respond? And so instead of knowing for sure WHY THEY WANT ANY OF THAT IN THE FIRST TWO THOUSAND TRESTS BEFORE YOU CAN SAY WHAT BECAUSE EVERYTHING IS SAME AND IF IT'S SOMETHING GOVERNED OR NOT THERE
